items.title: JPMorgan’s Tariff-Day Trade Is Going Long on Automaker Bonds

items.title: Charles Schwab Upgraded To Buy As It 'Shifts To Offense'
items.description: Charles Schwab stock climbed on an upgrade Wednesday. BofA expects cautionary tone from banks for Q1 results next week.

items.title: TCW Relative Value Large Cap Fund Q4 2024 Commentary
items.description: The Fed lowered rates by 25 bps at its December meeting but forecasted fewer cuts (two versus four) in 2025 due to inflation concerns. Read more here.
